reviews.comment:
Excelente atención, lindo shop FULL, con hostería y restaurante. Si hay cola para cargar combustible, vale la pena esperar, la otra YPF es un desastre

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, nice fully stocked shop with a guesthouse and restaurant. If there's a line for fuel, it's worth the wait; the other YPF is a disaster.

reviews.comment:
Muy bien el ACA, baños limpios y el restaurante de ahí del ACA es muy bueno, completo y a buen precio.

(Translated by Google)
The ACA is very good, the bathrooms are clean and the restaurant there is very good, complete and at a good price.

reviews.comment:
Abundante y rico. Desorganizados con la espera y los platos. Excelentes platos.

(Translated by Google)
Abundant and delicious. Disorganized with the wait and the dishes. Excellent dishes.

reviews.comment:
Buena YPF. Es gratis el agua para socios del ACA (no como en Bariloche que le quieren cobrar al socio las fichas también)
Los baños siempre, siempre están limpios, huelen bien y tienen papel en todos los cubículos.
Excelente!

(Translated by Google)
Good YPF. Water is free for ACA members (unlike in Bariloche where they try to charge members for tokens too). The restrooms are always clean, smell good, and have toilet paper in every stall. Excellent!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ5NTlmeE9nEAE
